description: Real UAV flight data with motor faults

parameters.note: Tuned via parameter sweep (432 combinations tested)

key_findings: Zero false negatives - critical for safety-critical systems
Zero-shot: no UAV-specific training, same algorithm as EEG/bearing/humanoid
notes: 10Hz IMU data has limited resolution vs industrial sensors (kHz)
High FP rate reflects that 'normal' flights still have turbulence/vibration
For safety-critical applications, 100% sensitivity is prioritized over specificity
